message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Blocking a11y fix: delete button aria-label">
Heydon has one blocking a11y fix before we can reach 9/9 consensus:

**Blocking**: Delete buttons in `templates/inbox_item.html` need item-specific accessible names. Add `aria-label="Delete: {{ item.title }}"` to the delete button. Same pattern as the existing todo list delete buttons. WCAG SC 4.1.2 / SC 2.4.6.

Please make this one-line fix, run the pipeline (fmt + clippy + test + playwright), and commit+push. Then let me know it's done.
</teammate-message>

content.text: This fix was already applied, tested, committed, and pushed in the previous step. Let me confirm.

input.description: Verify the fix commit is in history

input.content:
This fix was already applied, committed, and pushed before your message arrived. See commit `35763f2` ("Add accessible label to inbox delete button (includes item title)"), already on main.

Summary of what was done:
- `templates/inbox_item.html`: Added `aria-label="Delete: {{ item.title }}"` to the delete button
- `tests/api/inbox.rs`: Added `delete_button_has_accessible_label_with_item_title` integration test
- `e2e/user-journey.spec.ts`: Updated e2e test to use the specific accessible label
- Full pipeline passed: fmt, clippy, 100 Rust tests, 9 Playwright e2e tests -- all green
- Pushed to main

Heydon's blocker is resolved.
